## NXOpen.Annotations.BaseCustomSymbolBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a32824.html

Represents a base Builder for Drafting and PMI Custom Symbol

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetArbitraryNoteTitle()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the arbitrary note value in an array.More... |
| `GetSymbol()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.BaseCustomSymbol` | Returns the custom symbolMore... |

| `SelectText(int index)` | `unsafe void` | Selects the node index of custom symbol textMore... |
| `SetArbitraryNoteTitle(string [] arbitraryNoteTitle)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the arbitrary note value.More... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a32864.html

Represents aNXOpen.Annotations.BaseFrameBarBuilder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `CreateFrameBarObject()` | `unsafe void` | Creates frame bar objectMore... |
| `DeleteFrameBarObject()` | `unsafe void` | This function is used to delete frame barMore... |
| `GetFramebar()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.BaseFrameBar` | The frame barMore... |
| `ReverseAlongHullSide()` | `unsafe void` | This function is used to reverse along hull sideMore... |
| `ReverseTics()` | `unsafe void` | This function is used to reverse tics on the framebarMore... |
| `UpdateFrameBarFromStyle()` | `unsafe void` | Updates frame bar object as per styleMore... |
| `UpdateFromConceptModel()` | `unsafe void` | This function is used to update framebar from Concept modelMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |

## NXOpen.Annotations.BaseIdSymbolBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a32880.html

Represents a base id symbol

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `BalloonType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.BalloonTypes` | Returns or sets the balloon typeMore... |
| `Inherit[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.SelectIdSymbol` | Returns the inherit The id symbol from which the style properties are inheritedMore... |
| `Leader[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.LeaderBuilder` | Returns theNXOpen.Annotations.LeaderBuilderfor the annotationMore... |
| `LowerText[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the lower text The text displayed in the lower portion of the divided symbol In case Quadrant Circle symbol, the lower text is placed in the lower right quadrant just above the horizontal dividing line.More... |
| `Origin[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.OriginBuilder` | Returns the origin, where the symbol is going to be displayedMore... |
| `Size[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the size The circle symbols are measured by diameter, the rounded box is measured by length, and all other symbols are measured by a circumscribed circleMore... |
| `Style[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.StyleBuilder` | Returns the styleMore... |
| `UpperText[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the upper text The text displayed in the upper portion of the divided symbol In case Quadrant Circle symbol, the upper text is placed in the upper left quadrant just above the horizontal dividing line.More... |

## NXOpen.Annotations.CenterlineBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a33020.html

Represents a Base Centerline Builder for all types of centerlines

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `AddEndExtensions(double start, double end)` | `unsafe void` | Adds extensions only at endsMore... |
| `AddExtension(int index, double defaultValue)` | `unsafe void` | Adds extension based on select object indexMore... |
| `GetAllExtensions()` | `unsafe double []` | Returns all extensions.More... |
| `GetAllIndividualExtensions()` | `unsafe double []` | Returns individual extensions.More... |
| `GetEndExtensions()` | `unsafe double []` | Returns end extensions only.More... |
| `RemoveEndExtensions()` | `unsafe void` | Removes extensions only at endsMore... |
| `RemoveExtension(int index)` | `unsafe void` | Removes extension based on select object indexMore... |
| `ResetAllExtensions(double defaultValue)` | `unsafe void` | Reset all extensions by the supplied defaultValueMore... |
| `SetAllIndividualExtensions(double [] extensionValues)` | `unsafe void` | Sets all individual extensionsMore... |
| `SetEndExtensions(double start, double end)` | `unsafe void` | Modifies end extensions onlyMore... |
| `SetIndividualExtensions(int index, double value1, double value2)` | `unsafe void` | Modifies extensions based on select object indexMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |

## NXOpen.Annotations.DatumFeatureSymbolBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a33176.html

Represents a Base Datum Feature Symbol Builder for all types of datum feature symbols

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `InheritFrom(NXOpen.Annotations.BaseDatuminheritTag)` | `unsafe void` | The datum feature symbol is inherited form the given datum feature symbol.More... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |

| `ComputedSize[get]` | `unsafe double` | Returns the computed size of the dimension.More... |

| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

| `Leader[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.LeaderBuilder` | Returns theNXOpen.Annotations.LeaderBuilderfor the annotationMore... |
| `LowerText[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the lower text The text displayed in the lower portion of the divided symbol In case Quadrant Circle symbol, the lower text is placed in the lower right quadrant just above the horizontal dividing line.More... |
| `Origin[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.OriginBuilder` | Returns the origin, where the symbol is going to be displayedMore... |
| `Size[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the size The circle symbols are measured by diameter, the rounded box is measured by length, and all other symbols are measured by a circumscribed circleMore... |
| `Style[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.StyleBuilder` | Returns the styleMore... |
| `UpperText[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the upper text The text displayed in the upper portion of the divided symbol In case Quadrant Circle symbol, the upper text is placed in the upper left quadrant just above the horizontal dividing line.More... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Annotations.LightweightSectionBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a33800.html

Represents aNXOpen.Annotations.LightweightSectionbuilder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetSectionCurves(outNXOpen.Curve[] curves)` | `unsafe void` | Returns the lightweight section view curvesMore... |
| `AlternatePlane()` | `unsafe void` | Cycle through planes that are 90 degrees aligned to the current section plane.More... |
| `CreateDatumPlane()` | `unsafeNXOpen.DatumPlane` | Creates a datum plane from the active section plane.More... |
| `EditView(NXOpen.ModelingViewview)` | `unsafe void` | Edits the section object in the modeling view.More... |
| `GetActivePlane(outNXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.AxisplaneAxis, outNXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.ActivePlaneactivePlane)` | `unsafe void` | Gets the active plane in the section.More... |
| `GetAllPlanesGeometry(outNXOpen.Point3d[] planeOrigins, outNXOpen.Matrix3x3[] planeMetrices)` | `unsafe void` | Gets geometry for all planes of the section.More... |
| `GetAssociativePlane()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | The dynamic section associative plane.More... |
| `GetBoundingBox(outNXOpen.Point3dminCornerPt, outNXOpen.Point3dmaxCornerPt)` | `unsafe void` | Gets bounding box used by the section.More... |
| `GetGridSettings()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Display.PlaneGridBuilder` | Creates a grid settings builder from the active section plane.More... |
| `GetName()` | `unsafe string` | Gets the section name.More... |
| `GetNormal()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Vector3d` | Gets the normal of the section planeMore... |
| `GetOffset()` | `unsafe double` | Gets the the plane offset.More... |
| `GetOffsetLimits(out double minimumOffset, out double maximumOffset)` | `unsafe void` | Gets minimum and maximum offset limits.More... |
| `GetOrigin()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Gets the section origin.More... |
| `GetPlaneGeometry(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.AxisaxisType,NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.ActivePlaneplaneType, outNXOpen.Point3dorigin, outNXOpen.Matrix3x3matrix)` | `unsafe void` | Gets geometry of specified plane of the section.More... |
| `GetPlaneThickness()` | `unsafe double` | Gets the thickness between active plane pair.More... |
| `GetRotationAngle(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.AxisrotationAxis)` | `unsafe double` | Gets rotation angle for specified axis.More... |
| `GetRotationMatrix()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Matrix3x3` | Gets the section rotation matrixMore... |
| `IsAssociativitySupported()` | `unsafe bool` | Determines if an associative section plane is supported.More... |
| `IsDefaultPlane()` | `unsafe bool` | Indicates whether the section plane is at the default location.More... |
| `LoadAllIntersecting(outNXOpen.PartLoadStatusloadStatus)` | `unsafe bool` | Loads all components that intersect the current section plane.More... |
| `LoadNearIntersecting(outNXOpen.PartLoadStatusloadStatus)` | `unsafe bool` | Loads components that intersect the current section plane and are near the section plane origin.More... |
| `OffsetOriginInPlane(double xOffset, double yOffset)` | `unsafe void` | Offsets section origin within current section plane.More... |
| `PlaneX()` | `unsafe void` | Creates a plane along X direction.More... |
| `PlaneY()` | `unsafe void` | Creates a plane along Y direction.More... |
| `PlaneZ()` | `unsafe void` | Creates a plane along Z direction.More... |
| `RestoreView()` | `unsafe void` | Restores the section to the saved section in the view database.More... |
| `ReverseDirection()` | `unsafe void` | Reverses the plane direction.More... |
| `SaveCurves(string groupName)` | `unsafe void` | Creates curves by intersecting all clipping planes of the section with all visible bodies in the scene and adds them to the group created with the specified name.More... |
| `SetActivePlane(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.AxisplaneAxis,NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.ActivePlaneactivePlane)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the active plane in the sectionMore... |
| `SetAllPlanesGeometry(NXOpen.Point3d[] planeOrigins,NXOpen.Matrix3x3[] planeMetrices)` | `unsafe bool` | Sets geometry for all planes of the section.More... |
| `SetAssociativePlane(NXOpen.PlaneplaneTag)` | `unsafe void` | Makes dynamic section associative to the specified plane The plane must be a smart plane; otherwise an error will be reported.More... |
| `SetBoundingBox(NXOpen.Point3dminCornerPt,NXOpen.Point3dmaxCornerPt)` | `unsafe void` | Sets bounding box for the section.More... |
| `SetDefaultPlane()` | `unsafe void` | Set current section plane to its default definition.More... |
| `SetDefaults()` | `unsafe void` | Set current section to the default values.More... |
| `SetName(string sectionName)` | `unsafe bool` | Sets the section name.More... |
| `SetNormal(NXOpen.Vector3dnormal)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the normal of the section planeMore... |
| `SetOffset(double offset)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the the plane offset.More... |
| `SetOffsetByPoint(NXOpen.Point3dpoint)` | `unsafe void` | This method offsets the active clipping plane such that the plane passes through the specified point.More... |
| `SetOrigin(NXOpen.Point3dorigin)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the section origin.More... |
| `SetPlane(NXOpen.Point3daxisOrigin,NXOpen.Point3dorigin,NXOpen.Matrix3x3rotationMatrix)` | `unsafe void` | Sets a section plane to be the specified plane The plane is created at the specified origin with the specified rotation matrix.More... |
| `SetPlaneThickness(double planeThickness)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the thickness between active plane pair.More... |
| `SetRotationAngle(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.AxisrotationAxis, double angle)` | `unsafe void` | Rotates the section about specified axis by the specified angle.More... |
| `SetRotationMatrix(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.AxisrotationAxis,NXOpen.Matrix3x3rotationMatrix)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the section rotation matrixMore... |
| `ShowCurvePreview(bool showCurvePreview)` | `unsafe void` | Show/hide curve preview.More... |
| `ShowSectionCurves(bool showCurves)` | `unsafe void` | Shows the section curves in the view associated with the builder.More... |
| `UpdateBoxExtents()` | `unsafe void` | Update box section display by recomputing the box extents if necessary.More... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AssemblyCrosshatching[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the assembly crosshatch optionMore... |

| `CapColorOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.CapColorOption` | Returns or sets the cap color optionMore... |
| `ClipType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.Clip` | Returns or sets the clip typeMore... |
| `CsysType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.CoordinateSystem` | Returns or sets the coordinate system used for creating section plane along X, Y or Z principal planes.More... |
| `CurveColor[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXColor` | Returns or sets the curve color.More... |
| `CurveColorOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Display.DynamicSectionTypes.CurveColorOption` | Returns or sets the curve color optionMore... |

| `DeferCurveUpdate[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the defer curve update property.More... |
| `InterferenceColor[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXColor` | Returns or sets the interference color.More... |
| `LayerSettings[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Display.LayerSettingsBuilder` | Returns the layer settings builderMore... |
| `LockPlanes[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the lock planes flag.More... |

## NXOpen.Annotations.LightweightSectionView

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a33804.html

Represents a PMI Lightweight Section View

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetCuttingPlaneSymbol()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.CuttingPlaneSymbol` | Returns the cutting plane symbol of lightweight section view; otherwise NULL will be returnedMore... |
| `GetSectionCurvesVisibility()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns the lightweight section view curves visiblityMore... |
| `SetSectionCurvesVisibility(bool optionHideShow)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the lightweight section view curves visiblityMore... |
| `ExpandCollapseNode(bool expand)` | `unsafe void` | Expand or collapse the node for the specified Model View in the Part Navigator.More... |
| `IsDynamicSectionVisible(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectiondynamicSection)` | `unsafe bool` | Returns if the specified dynamic section object is visible in this view.More... |
| `SetDynamicSectionVisible(NXOpen.Display.DynamicSectiondynamicSection, bool visible)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the specified dynamic section object is visible/invisible in this view.More... |
| `UseDefaultLights()` | `unsafe void` | Changes the set of lights used in the given view to the "Default" set, which for now is the Scene Ambient, Scene Left Top and Scene Right Top lights.More... |
| `UseSceneLights()` | `unsafe void` | Changes the set of lights used in the given view to the "Scene" set, which for now includes the eight predefined scene lights (including the Scene Ambient light).More... |
| `AskVisibleObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.DisplayableObject[]` | Returns an array of objects visible in a view.More... |
| `ChangePerspective(bool changeViewToPerspective)` | `unsafe void` | Changes a view from an orthographic view to a perspective view, or from a perspective view to an orthographic view.More... |
| `Concatenate(NXOpen.Point3dtranslation)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given translation with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `Concatenate(double scale)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given scale with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `Concatenate(NXOpen.Point3dtranslation, double scale)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given translation and scale with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `Concatenate(NXOpen.Point3dcenterOfRotation,NXOpen.Vector3drotationAxis, double angle)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given rotation with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `Concatenate(NXOpen.Point3dtranslation,NXOpen.Point3dcenterOfRotation,NXOpen.Vector3drotationAxis, double angle)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given translation and rotation with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `Concatenate(double scale,NXOpen.Point3dcenterOfRotation,NXOpen.Vector3drotationAxis, double angle)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given scale and rotation with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `Concatenate(NXOpen.Point3dtranslation, double scale,NXOpen.Point3dcenterOfRotation,NXOpen.Vector3drotationAxis, double angle)` | `unsafe void` | Concatenates the given translation, scale and rotation with the previous viewing transformation of the specified view.More... |
| `EnableNavigationFlyThrough(bool isEnable)` | `unsafe void` | Enables Fly-through by virtually placing you as a first-person observer in the view.More... |
| `Expand()` | `unsafe void` | Expands the specified view to fill as much of the layout which contains the view as possible, without changing the aspect ratio of the view.More... |
| `Fit()` | `unsafe void` | Adjusts the bounds of a given view so that it fully encompasses the extents of the model geometry.More... |
| `FitAfterShowOrHide(NXOpen.View.ShowOrHideTypetype)` | `unsafe void` | Adjusts the bounds of a given view conditionally so that it fully encompasses the extents of the model geometry.More... |
| `FitToObjects(NXOpen.IFitTo[] objects)` | `unsafe void` | Adjusts the bounds of a given view so that it fully encompasses the extents of the given objects.More... |
| `FlyToObjects(NXOpen.INXObject[] objects)` | `unsafe void` | Fly to the given objects.More... |
| `GetAxis(NXOpen.XYZAxisxYZAxis)` | `unsafeNXOpen.Vector3d` | Returns one of the view axes.More... |
| `GetExpandedScale()` | `unsafe double` | Returns the view scale, including any expansion factor.More... |
| `HasPreview()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns whether or not the given view has a preview.More... |
| `IsNavigationFlyThroughEnabled()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns whether or not Fly-through is enabled.More... |
| `MakeWork()` | `unsafe void` | Makes the given view the work view.More... |
| `NavigationFlyThrough(NXOpen.Point3dstartPoint,NXOpen.Point3dstartEnd)` | `unsafe void` | In Fly-through, fly from start point and ends at end point.More... |
| `NavigationFlyThroughWithScale(double relativeScale)` | `unsafe void` | In Fly-through, fly use relative scale.More... |
| `Orient(NXOpen.Matrix3x3matrix)` | `unsafe void` | Changes the view orientation relative to the specified absolute coordinate system.More... |
| `Orient(NXOpen.View.CannedviewName,NXOpen.View.ScaleAdjustmentviewScale)` | `unsafe void` | Changes the view orientation to a specified canned view.More... |
| `Orient(string viewName,NXOpen.View.ScaleAdjustmentviewScale)` | `unsafe void` | Changes the view orientation to a specified view.More... |
| `PanToObjects(NXOpen.INXObject[] objects)` | `unsafe void` | Pans and centers the view to the given objects.More... |
| `Regenerate()` | `unsafe void` | Regenerates the display of given view.More... |
| `Restore()` | `unsafe bool` | Restores a view to its last remembered rotation, scale and translation.More... |
| `RestoreNavigationHomeView()` | `unsafe void` | Restore and transitions from the current view to the home view.More... |
| `Rotate(NXOpen.Matrix3x3matrix)` | `unsafe void` | Rotates the view by concatenating the given matrix to the existing rotation matrix of the view.More... |
| `Rotate(NXOpen.Point3dorigin,NXOpen.Vector3dvector, double angle)` | `unsafe void` | Rotates the specified view using the specified origin of rotation and about the specified axis.More... |
| `SaveNavigationHomeView()` | `unsafe void` | Save the current view as the home view.More... |
| `SaveViewWithViewName(string replacementChar)` | `unsafeNXOpen.View` | Increment the name of given view with replacement character.More... |
| `SetOrigin(NXOpen.Point3dorigin)` | `unsafe void` | Moves the given position to the center of the view.More... |
| `SetRotationTranslationScale(NXOpen.Matrix3x3rotMatrix,NXOpen.Point3dtranslation, double scale)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the rotation, translation and scale of the specified view.More... |
| `SetScale(double scale)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the scale of the specified view to the desired scale factor.More... |
| `SnapToClosestCannedOrientation()` | `unsafe void` | Changes the orientation of the given view to the orientation of the canned view whose orientation is the closest to that of the given view.More... |
| `SnapToVariantCannedOrientation()` | `unsafe void` | Similar toNXOpen.View.SnapToClosestCannedOrientationexcept it changes the orientation of the given view to the orientation of some canned view "variant" based on I-deas's 'snapview' logic whose orientation is the closest to one of the six orthographic and eight flavors of trimetric views.More... |
| `UpdateCustomSymbols()` | `unsafe void` | Updates custom symbol in a drawing member view or drawing sheetMore... |
| `UpdateDisplay()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the display of given view, as needed.More... |
| `Zoom(NXOpen.View.ScaleFactorscaleFactor)` | `unsafe void` | Scales the specified view to a desired relative scale.More... |
| `ZoomAboutPoint(double relativeScale,NXOpen.Point3dscaleAboutPoint,NXOpen.Point3dviewCenter)` | `unsafe void` | Scales the specified view such that the given scale_about_point does not move.More... |
| `ZoomByRectangle(NXOpen.Point3dcorner1,NXOpen.Point3dcorner2)` | `unsafe void` | Scales the specified view such that the specified rectangle is as large as possible while being fully contained within the viewport.More... |
| `CreateAttributeIterator()` | `unsafeNXOpen.AttributeIterator` | Create an attribute iteratorMore... |
| `DeleteAllAttributesByType(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes all attributes of a specific type.More... |
| `DeleteAllAttributesByType(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes all attributes of a specific type with the option to update or not.More... |
| `DeleteAttributeByTypeAndTitle(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype, string title)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes an attribute by type and title.More... |
| `DeleteAttributeByTypeAndTitle(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype, string title,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes an attribute by type and title with the option to update or not.More... |
| `DeleteUserAttribute(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype, string title, bool deleteEntireArray,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the first attribute encountered with the given Type, Title.More... |
| `DeleteUserAttributes(NXOpen.AttributeIteratoriterator,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the attributes on the object, if any, that satisfy the given iteratorMore... |
| `DeleteUserAttributes(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the attributes encountered with the given Type with option to update or not.More... |
| `FindObject(string journalIdentifier)` | `unsafeNXOpen.INXObject` | Finds theNXOpen.NXObjectwith the given identifier as recorded in a journal.More... |
| `GetAttributeTitlesByType(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype)` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject.AttributeInformation[]` | Gets all the attribute titles of a specific type.More... |
| `GetBooleanUserAttribute(string title, int index)` | `unsafe bool` | Gets a boolean attribute by Title and array Index.More... |
| `GetComputationalTimeUserAttribute(string title, int index)` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject.ComputationalTime` | Gets a time attribute by Title and array Index.More... |
| `GetIntegerAttribute(string title)` | `unsafe int` | Gets an integer attribute by title.More... |
| `GetIntegerUserAttribute(string title, int index)` | `unsafe int` | Gets an integer attribute by Title and array Index.More... |
| `GetNextUserAttribute(NXOpen.AttributeIteratoriterator, outNXOpen.NXObject.AttributeInformationinfo)` | `unsafe bool` | Gets the next attribute encountered on the object, if any, that satisfies the given iterator.More... |
| `GetPdmReferenceAttributeValue(string attributeTitle)` | `unsafe string` | Gets the value of PDM Reference attribute for given object.More... |
| `GetRealAttribute(string title)` | `unsafe double` | Gets a real attribute by title.More... |
| `GetRealUserAttribute(string title, int index)` | `unsafe double` | Gets a real attribute by Title and array Index.More... |
| `GetReferenceAttribute(string title)` | `unsafe string` | Gets the reference string (not the calculated value) of a string attribute that uses a reference string.More... |
| `GetStringAttribute(string title)` | `unsafe string` | Gets a string attribute value by title.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AllowManualRows[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the allow manual rows option that determines whether or not manual rows are allowed to be inserted into a parts listMore... |
| `AutomaticUpdate[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the automatic update option to determine whether or not the parts list updates automatically whenever a change occurs to a referenced object in the modelMore... |
| `CalloutSuffix[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the callout suffix specifies the suffix to be used for reference symbol textMore... |
| `CharToSkip[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the characters to skip specifies the characters to be skipped for calloutsMore... |
| `CreateNewRowAsLocked[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the create new row as locked option that determines whether new rows in the parts list are locked automatically on creationMore... |
| `EnableCrossHighlighting[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag to enable cross highlightingMore... |
| `GrowDirectionOptions[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.PartsListBuilder.PartsListGrowDirectionOptions` | Returns or sets the grow direction options that specify the direction of growth for the parts listMore... |
| `HighlightColor[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXColor` | Returns or sets the highlight color specifies the color used for the delimiters that highlight manual cell textMore... |
| `HighlightManualText[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the highlight manual text specifies whether manual cell text is to be highlighted by delimitersMore... |
| `Increment[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the increment specifies the value by which consecutive callout values are be incrementedMore... |
| `InitialCallout[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the initial callout specifies the text string used to represent the first callout in the parts listMore... |
| `LockPartsListSetup[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the Lock Parts List Setup option that determines Is the parts list setup protected/lockedMore... |
| `MainSymbolCustomText[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the main symbol custom text specifies the custom text to display in the main callout symbolMore... |
| `MainSymbolText[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.PartsListBuilder.PartsListMainSymbolText` | Returns or sets the main symbol text specifies the text to display in the main callout symbolMore... |
| `PackRoutedStockComponents[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag indicating whether packing routed stock and insulation components is enabled.More... |
| `ReferenceSymbolCustomText[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the reference symbol custom text specifies the custom text to display in the main callout symbolMore... |
| `ReferenceSymbolText[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.PartsListBuilder.PartsListReferenceSymbolText` | Returns or sets the reference symbol text specifies the text to display in the reference callout symbolMore... |
| `ShowLockedDeletedRows[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.PartsListBuilder.PartsListShowLockedDeletedRows` | Returns or sets the show locked deleted rows option to show rows that are locked, but reference components that have been removed from the assemblyMore... |
| `ShowReferenceCalloutSuffix[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag indicating whether the reference callout suffix will be displayed.More... |
| `SortOnUpdate[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the sort on update option that determines whether or not the parts list sorts automatically during updateMore... |
| `Symbol[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.PartsListBuilder.PartsListSymbolType` | Returns or sets the symbol type specifies the balloon type used to call out membersMore... |
| `VerticalGroupAttachment[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.PartsListBuilder.PartsListVerticalGroupLeaderAttachment` | Returns or sets the leader attachment to vertical callout groupsMore... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |
